title: IDA Account Meta — savings ledger + 3:1 match goal + 529 todo
html:
TL;DR

  • Jan 9, 2026 financial-meta capture: Yahir's Individual Development Account (IDA) balance is $2,650, target is $3,000 to trigger a 3:1 match ($3K saved → $9K matched, $12K total).
  • Forward-todo line: "open up 529 account" — the 529 is queued as the next savings vehicle after IDA hits the match.
  • Account number redacted from this summary (10-digit identifier present in immutable raw note only).
  • Captures Yahir's late-stage IDA execution — he's $350 away from triggering a $9K match, the kind of asymmetric one-time-yield event that doesn't recur. The same week as the Shef hours tracking and Rankett.com brand stake note.
  • Strong evidence Yahir is in bridge-income mode: gym shift cash flow + IDA savings sprint + rankett launch prep, all stacked into the first two weeks of Jan 2026.

Why it matters

The IDA is a community-asset-building program — typically requires earned-income proof, monthly deposits, and a "qualified-asset" use (education, home, business). This note documents Yahir actively moving through the 3:1 match qualification window, days before he'd publish the Rankett brand stake post and confront the "someone else just publicly staked the AI-visibility claim" tweet. The IDA + 529 stack is the financial scaffolding beneath the founder arc: while Memory.md narrates the $5K/mo and $100K/mo Rankett milestones as the headline goals, this note shows the patient slow-money rails Yahir is also pulling — matched savings, then 529 — to build a non-Rankett floor. Pairs with the 2025 09 23 how im scraping by context.

Privacy redaction

  • 10-digit IDA account number on line 9 of source — not surfaced in summary. Lives in immutable raw doc only.

Open questions

  • Which IDA program? (Could be Neighborhood Partnerships Oregon or a Ford Family-adjacent vehicle.)
  • Is the 529 for Maya (younger sister)?
  • Did the $3K match trigger? (Worth tracking in next finance-flavored note.)
